CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:WheelCarousel.kt$@Composable public fun WheelStrip( entries: List<WheelEntry>, orientation: RailOrientation, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, state: LazyListState = rememberLazyListState(), crossAxisSize: Dp = 40.dp, gap: Dp = 2.dp, edgePadding: Dp = 4.dp, falloff: Dp = 0.dp, minScale: Float = 0.6f, minAlpha: Float = 0f, fadeEdgeWidth: Dp = crossAxisSize, selectedKey: Any? = null, indicatorColor: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer, indicatorSize: Dp = 40.dp, )

MaxLineLength:WheelCarousel.kt$val falloff = if (falloffPx > 0f) falloffPx else (layoutInfo.viewportEndOffset - layoutInfo.viewportStartOffset) / 2f
